config.html: <style> .hero-title, .title, .fb-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif !important; } .fb-card { background: white; border-radius: 2px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; border: 1px solid #f3f4f6; overflow: hidden; } .fb-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px -8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .fb-card-img-wrap { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; } .fb-card-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.7s ease; } .fb-card:hover .fb-card-img { transform: scale(1.05); } .fb-card-badge { position: absolute; top: 1rem; left: 1rem; background: #11352f; color: white; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .fb-card-body { padding: 2rem; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .fb-card-title { font-size: 1.5rem; color: #11352f; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.2; } .fb-card:hover .fb-card-title { color: #c19a5b; } .fb-card-desc { color: #4b5563; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; flex: 1; } details.styled-accordion { background: white; border: 1px solid #f3f4f6; border-radius: 4px; overflow: visible !important; margin-bottom: 1rem; transition: box-shadow 0.3s; } .acc-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #11352f; } .acc-content { padding: 0 1.5rem 2rem 4.5rem; color: #4b5563; line-height: 1.7; }</style>
